evidenceChecked: Frozen HEAD 851f56eea851e79e819b699939196ad9ea1d6fa4; lesson.json, assessment.json, references.json, claims.json, glossary.json, ATTRIBUTION.md, and all nine declared content/*.md files.

Fresh npm ci and npm run site:build; generated site/data/lessons/PREM-LPP-001.json reported schemaVersion 3, artifactType production-lesson, version 0.1.1, nine scenes, four assessment items, one reference, and nine glossary terms.
Fresh site/data/premed-lessons.json exposed dataUrl /data/lessons/PREM-LPP-001.json and readerUrl /premed/lessons/read/?lesson=PREM-LPP-001 while leaving the draft outside publishedLessonIds.

Actual production route in headless Chrome at 1280x720: Home, End, ArrowRight, guided/reading modes, live-region announcements, text response, feedback, stable scene navigation, attribution disclosure, and zero console or page errors.

Browser print path: 9/9 required scenes, 4/4 assessment items, 4/4 rubrics, reference, 9/9 glossary terms, and attribution; every scene retained source text, print had one h1, nested headings were shifted, and the DOM had no duplicate IDs.
The repaired text control rendered the literal placeholder 'Write your response in your own words.', applied the item maxLength, accepted keyboard entry, and exposed model reasoning after submission.
390x844 touch-capable reduced-motion context across all nine scenes and a 200% CSS-zoom check at 640px: no document, stage, scene, or page horizontal overflow; skip-link focus was visibly outlined.
Keyboard-only narrow drawer check: activation, post-transition Shift+Tab access to scene links, Escape closure, and focus return; the attempted initial focus move did not leave the opener.
Targeted tests passed: production pack schema/route protocol test; published production route keyboard/complete-print Playwright test; and mobile all-routes horizontal-overflow Playwright test.

Rights comparison against course/PREMED-KNOWLEDGE-GRAPH.md sections 2, 3, 5.1, and 6, site/data/premed-graph.json, CONTENT-LICENSE.md, RIGHTS-POLICY.md, references.json, lesson.json#thirdPartyAssets, and ATTRIBUTION.md.

Security/privacy inspection of constrained Markdown, local paths, HTML sanitization, safe links, print cloning, assessment rendering, fictional learner framing, disclosure, and the absence of assets, personal data, secrets, raw HTML, scripts, remote embeds, or executable lesson content.

findings.finding: The exact fresh build repairs the five named prior delivery defects. It emits lesson schemaVersion 3 with artifactType production-lesson; publishes the stable data and reader URLs in the lesson index; builds a print document containing all nine scenes, all four assessment items and rubrics, references, glossary, and attribution; removes nested source h1 elements and shifts their descendants beneath one print-document h1 without duplicate IDs; and renders a meaningful short-response placeholder instead of an empty or generic defect state.

The text-only lesson provides equivalent sensory and motor routes: every hierarchy and edge relation is stated in prose or a table, no outcome depends on color, position, sound, motion, hover, drag, or timing, all attempts are untimed and retakeable, and response alternatives preserve the same map-reading operation. Semantic source order, visible headings, lists, tables, fieldsets, labels, status feedback, keyboard scene shortcuts, continuous reading, print, narrow reflow, reduced-motion behavior, and local table overflow were checked on the production artifact.

At 390px, keyboard activation opens the contents drawer but the synchronous indexClose.focus() call occurs before the visibility transition has made the drawer focusable, so focus remains on the Contents opener and the next Tab moves to the Reading control rather than into the drawer. After the transition, Shift+Tab reaches the last scene link; global scene shortcuts remain available; Escape closes the drawer and returns focus to the opener. This is a bounded focus-placement and navigation-efficiency defect, not a keyboard trap or loss of the core learning route.
findings.resolution: Move focus into the drawer after it becomes focusable, for example on the next animation frame or transition completion, and keep closed drawer descendants out of sequential focus navigation. Preserve Escape closure and focus return to the opener.

findings.finding: The sole substantive source is a versioned local EmbeddedKnowledge specification covered by the repository CC BY 4.0 content license and recorded as facts-only research with dated checked-no-agent-restriction-found access. The lesson uses an independently designed instructional sequence, fictional examples, questions, tables, and wording; no close source-structure tracking, quotation, adapted media, dataset extraction, human-only source processing, or third-party asset was found. Original lesson content is offered under CC BY 4.0, exceptions are absent, and accountable author-agent provenance is disclosed as attested rather than verified.

The candidate contains no identifiable learner or patient data, clinical media, secrets, copyrighted answer bank, active SVG, TeX, executable code, raw HTML, remote embed, or asset path. Noor and Harbor Medical School are explicitly fictional and the admissions boundary is explicit. The implemented compiler resolves pack-local files, rejects traversal and symlink escape, renders constrained content, sanitizes compiled HTML again in the browser, and uses safe opener/referrer behavior for the one external reference link.

limitations: This is an accessibility-and-rights policy review, not legal advice. License, copyright, privacy, consent, contract, and database-law conclusions can vary by jurisdiction; no qualified legal opinion or source-owner warranty was obtained.

Interface checks were time-boxed in headless Chrome using semantic DOM inspection, keyboard interaction, a touch-capable 390x844 context, reduced motion, browser print media, and a 200% CSS-zoom reflow check. No representative screen reader, switch device, voice-control system, physical touch device, braille display, or user study was available.

Print evidence covers the implemented browser print DOM and stylesheet, not a physically inspected paper copy. PDF, EPUB, DOCX, and JATS exporters are not implemented and therefore were not claimed or tested.

The source-use record, agent-access check, author run ID, model, version, and author instructions digest are disclosed and attested by the accountable principal; their real-world provenance is not independently verified. Other review conclusions and any adjudication draft were deliberately not inspected.

This review instructions digest is the SHA-256 of the UTF-8 bytes of the exact user review directive followed without separators by repository AGENTS.md and .agents/skills/review-embeddedknowledge-accessibility-rights/SKILL.md. Hidden runtime or provider instructions were unavailable and are excluded.

The committed generated lesson cache at the candidate commit predates the revised pack, but generated outputs are noncanonical and the required fresh site build deterministically emitted the reviewed version 0.1.1 delivery artifact. This review assesses that exact fresh build and does not claim deployment of an unbuilt checkout.
